prevalence.trend: stable; detection increasing with genetic testing

burden.dalyPerCapita: high per-case disability; low population burden
burden.mortalityRate: Low with therapy; higher in untreated severe infantile forms

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical hypotonia/weakness plus genetic confirmation of SMN1 deletion

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: limited; pilot newborn screening in select states
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; access to disease-modifying therapy is limited

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Nusinersen or risdiplam when available; multidisciplinary respiratory/nutritional care
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High therapy cost and limited access outside reference centers
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Rare disease centers and growing diagnostic capacity
